name: Goblin Hunt
description: The goblin raids have grown too bold. Clear out three of the creatures from the dark forest road.
accept_text: Guild Master Hendricks nods curtly. 'Good. They've been terrorizing the forest road. Bring back proof of three kills — a tooth or a claw — and I'll see you paid.'
complete_text: Quest complete: Goblin Hunt! The forest road is safer for your efforts.
